name: Harald Malmgren
summary: Economist and former presidential adviser whose late-life public statements included extraordinary claims concerning government knowledge of UAP.
profileStatus: Former presidential adviser and late-life UAP claimant
profileSummary: Economist and former presidential adviser whose late-life public statements included extraordinary claims concerning government knowledge of UAP.
background: Former senior adviser on trade and economic policy in multiple U.S. administrations.
inclusionNote: Included because of his documented government career and the historical significance of his late-life statements. His extraordinary allegations require careful separation from his verified public-service record.
